141.content:
Nice choice, let’s have a quick recap of this girl:

Alexandra is an American gymnast and two-time Olympian. At the age of 22 she was an accomplished athlete, having scored several competitions. Her coach, Mihai Brestyan, was highly supportive of her, along with her choreographer and assistant coach, Sylvia Brestyan.

Aly’s family is composed by her parents, Lynn & Rick Raisman, and she has three younger siblings, Brett, Chloe and Madison. In her younger days she trained at the Brestyan’s American Gymnastics Club under what was going to be her Coach during her career. While there, she trained beside fellow gymnast Alicia Sacramone, which was in the young gymnast eyes like an older sister.

In 2011 she decided to become a professional athlete, joining with the Octagon sports management firm, hoping to open for herself a spot in the fashion career, sponsored by Ralph Lauren.

In September 2012, after receiving high praises from her fellow gymnasts, she injured herself during the Kellog’s Tour of Gymnastic Champions in Ontario, California.

In 2013, she attended Babson College in Wellesley, Massachusetts, before returning to her career the following year, after her coach requested her to pass the year training, in order to be sure that she had completely recovered from her injuries.

2015, on august 13 and 15, Aly competed at the National Championship in Indianapolis, ending up third, although she did manage to post the highest floor exercise score, beating Simone Biles, the reigning world champion on the event, by 0.300.

In 2017, Aly came forward as one of the victims of abuse from the former Olympic team physician Larry Nassar, joining the court to see the man processed for his guilts.

Now, with this quick recap done, how young Aly should get to gain weight?

14131.content:
Alexandra Raisman, known as Aly by her friends and family members, had just returned home after an injury she had received during one of her own competitions.

Albeit being lightly injured, she had nonetheless been forced to stay at home and rest for a few months, as it was ordered her by her physician and, even, by her own coach. Still, not one to let herself down, Aly had accepted the orders with a smile on her face, already dreaming of when she was going to return to her career.

But in her household, not everyone was as optimistic as she was.

Her parents, after having the pleasure of having their daughter back to them for barely a week, already could see that Alexandra was thinking only on returning to the career she loved so much. Rick and Lynn weren’t bad parents, they equally loved each of their children but, Aly was a special case in their eyes.

Especially since the injury, her mother began to fret on her daughter, risking herself in such a way over what she thought to be nothing worthy of the said risks. One night, as Aly had gone to bed to rest, both Lynn and Rick stayed behind in the dining room to discuss.

Rick Raisman was a gentle man, he was kind and polite, and yet, if someone had ever tried to harm one of his childs he would have turned on them like a wild beast. Still, as much as it had pained him to see his beautiful daughter unable to perform due to the injury, he wasn’t overly worried. His wife, Lynn, instead was getting afraid of the risks her daughter was placing herself in.

“Lynn, I think you’re overreacting”

“It was supposed to be harmless! What if, instead of bruising her legs, she had fallen headfirst and tumbled down on her neck?”

“Come on, you know Aly…she would never be so careless…”

“And yet, she had this injury.
Rick, it is not a matter of trusting our girl… Is a matter that the accidents can, and will, happen. Why should we let her go and increases her chance of having her life at risk? I’m not saying we should lock her in… But, we could find a way to have her leave this gymnastic thing.

Let her find a real job, living a real life.”

Rick, slowly mulled on his wife words. Although he was trying to not let it show, Aly’s injury had shaken him to the core. Deep inside, he knew of having the same doubts of his wife.

“And what would you do? How can you tell her that she can’t return to her career? She would end up destroyed…if she would listen at all.”

Lynn straightened herself as she sat at the table, looking at her husband in the eyes, showing him the resolve, she had within her to get their daughter to live in a safe environment.

“I know that. For this reason, I thought about something… Aly must rest in these months… so, no sports, no exercises and no tiring activities. All we’ve got to do is to let her grow complacent and satisfied of living here… and while we carry it out, we can make sure that she’s well fed. That, coupled with her currently stress-free life, will surely get her to put on a few pounds, so rendering her…”

“Rendering her unable to return to her career! Lynn, you’re a genius. But are we right in doing so? She’s a healthy girl already…wouldn’t it be bad of us to force her in such a way?”

“Do you prefer a slightly fatter daughter, or one that has lost her ability to move after an incident? We will just cater to her a bit, enough to let her lose this chance…afterwards, we can help her diet back again… in a few years, just to be on the safer side.

You know that she’s headstrong.

If we don’t work behind the scenes, she would never listen to us.
What do you say, babe?”

“Alright, Lynn. I’m not entirely convinced of doing this behind her back but, I agree with you. If we asked her to retire, she would ignore us and go for her way.

Yes. Let’s do it. But we have to be careful. Although we have only a few months to let her grow, we can’t be too hasty in this.”

As the two parents discussed and decided their plan of action, Aly was fast asleep already, dreaming of returning to the sport she loved so much.

As the new day began, knowing full well that their daughter was used to wake up pretty early in the morning, Lynn was already behind her door room, waiting to be hearing her daughter waking up. As soon as she heard her, she entered the room, trying to act as casually as she had brought with her a basket of already made laundry, to be used as justification if Aly was to ask.

“Hey mom…g’morning…”

“Good Morning, sweetheart. What are you doing already up?”

“What do you mean? I always wake up at this time…”

Lynn took a stern expression as she turned toward her daughter.

“That’s exactly what I mean. You should be resting. Doctor’s order, remember? Now, get back to bed and sleep a bit more…I’ll come to wake you up at the proper time.”

“A-Alright mom…Sheesh…”

Slowly, the young gymnast returned to bed and placed herself under the covers. As she wondered how she was going to return to sleep, now that she had woke up, she slowly drifted off on her own. Lynn, seeing her daughter sleeping again, hurried out of the room, silently, and went to the kitchen where Rick was busy preparing the breakfast for their daughter.

“So, Lynn, she’s in bed again, uh?”

“Yeah. I guess we shall have to keep doing this for a few days, until she starts sleeping in on her own. How’s breakfast coming along?”

“Well, it’s nothing much, in truth. Just a glass of orange juice, a scone, and a few cookies. Only, I’ve spiked everything with those medicines we took online.

Within a few days she should start developing quite the hunger. And with that she will start snacking on her own without our intervention anymore.”

“Good.
Remember Rick, we’re doing this for Aly’s future well-being”.


For the entire week, the two parents kept up with these and similar tricks, as they started to let Alexandra live quite the relaxing time. Always being around ready to provide to her for anything, barely letting her move a single finger. All meals that they brought to her, for Lynn requested her to just stay in bed to rest, were spiked with the same drugs that they had been using for her breakfasts.

As this lazy week had passed, Aly’s really was getting used to this royalty treatment and so began to get lazier on her own.

As the new week started, she began to wake up early in the morning, less and less, as she did notice that waking up a couple of hours later, especially since she couldn’t train, she always felt well rested. Still, she couldn’t fail to notice that lately she had started to feel rather hungry throughout the day but instead of making an issue out of it, she excused herself since she was ‘injured’ and ‘in need of the extra energies’ to cope with that. Plus, she couldn’t deny that having her breakfast prepared and brought directly to her by her parents was just so good.

Although both Lynn and Rick did all they could to keep her as still as possible, neither saw any real change in their daughter physical appearance, although her behavior had started to change already. As she was growing already lazier than before, reaping in the benefits of having them doing everything for her but, her body looked just fit and trim as it had always been.

Still, the couple didn’t worry. They knew that it was going to take some time for their plan to be really in motion.

They had just to wait a little bit longer, and then they could really start pushing on her with calories.

Not that Alexandra wasn’t already starting on her own.

Each and every day she made sure to have always a few more snacks than previously, during her daily ‘activities’, which involved more and more to just laze about in bed surfing the net on her phone or watching TV, instead of practicing light exercises in her room.

As that second week passed, Aly’s began to really get lazier about anything, which meant that she mainly woke up late, for her previous standards, at around 9:00 am, while she enjoyed a hearty homemade breakfast directly in her bed, quickly followed by a long stream of snacks brought forward by her mom, as she ate them leaning in bed, watching TV. During lunch and dinner time, as well as throughout the afternoon, she often found herself always munching something that she had always avoided before, being too rich in sugar or fats, or without the proper nutrients.

And yet, only the thought of depriving herself of these ‘harmless’ treats she had grown so used to, made her feel weak, so she simply gave herself some excuses as she started to indulge a little bit more with each passing day.

And yet, as the third week passed, Lynn still couldn’t see any external evidence that her daughter had started to grow thicker. Both she and her husband had made sure that their eldest daughter had turned into a lazier version of her previous self but, her body seemed to still be refusing to her physical perfection.

It was for this reason that, during one of the weekly, evening meetings, as they discussed about what to do with Alexandra, Lynn came out with the idea of…
14131.title: An athlete spoiled by her own parents

choices: Skip ahead to Christmas Dinner. Aly’s makes a pig out of herself.
keep following her weekly progress as she rounds herself up for Christmas
Aly receive a phone call from her friend Simone, asking if she can come visit?
Alexandra notices that she’s getting a bit fluffier. She tries to hold back
141312.content:
It was already three weeks since Aly had started being treated like a queen. In truth, she couldn’t say that it was bad. She got to rest most of the time, staying in bed as she watched tv, getting up only to go the bathroom. For the rest, her parents were coddling her about everything. And she was loving every moment of it.

‘I got to enjoy this for as long as it lasts. For as soon as I can exercise again, all of this treatment will end.’

Still, staying put in bed, eating homemade snacks all day long, had slowed down quite a bit her youthful metabolism and she had that to thanks for not having gained more than a couple of pounds overall. But everything was going to change, as her parents were getting ready to finally see her chub up a little bit.

That morning, as it had become usual, Aly woke up at around 9.30 AM yawning a bit as she remained in bed, covered by the warm blanket. As she was awake, as it had been agreed with her mom, she quickly called her a few times, to let her know she was awake and ready for breakfast.

Moments later, her room door opened, and her mom came in, holding within her hands a slightly larger tray than usual. Aly, stared at it feeling curious, as she realized that instead of her usual English breakfast, there were only items from Mc’Donald.

Her curiosity piqued, especially as her mom placed the tray right in her lap, revealing that it contained a couple of sausage McMuffin with eggs, four hash browns, a burrito, one milkshake and even two blueberry muffin.

Surprised by the large meal, although she had been eating just a smudge less in the last few days, Alexandra turned her stare at her mom, which just smiled at her in return.

“Something wrong, dear?”

“Mom? Are you…sure that this is right? I mean, junk food? And so much of it…”

“Oh, dear, you need your protein, don’t you? So, with your father we’ve found this nice little diet that will help you ge back in shape in half the time you would normally need. Isn’t it what you wanted?”

Aly, although unsure about that, was still interested in the idea of recovering faster from this resting time she had to be on. So, with a smile she took the first McMuffin and bit into it, quickly moaning slowly with herself as she found the taste amazing.

She had deprived herself from McDonald food for so long that she just couldn’t resist now. Slowly, she began eating all the items on her tray, alternating each bite with a bit of the shake. As she turned on the TV, she soon distracted herself and quickly polished off the tray, while she still licked her lips and fingers from any trace of the delicious food. At around 11.00 am, just as she was going to close the tv to bring down the empty tray, her mom returned into her room, this time carrying a similar tray as before, although the content was quite different this time.

“Here, dear, you must be starving after such a small breakfast. I’ve brought you a little snack to keep you up until lunch time.”

The girl, still laying in her bed, as said before, had grown used to receiving these kind of mid-morning snacks, although it surprised her to find, again, junk food piled on the tray. This time, though, feeling her own hunger rising, she barely made a fuss as Lynn left the tray on her lap.

“Thanks Mom. Although, it wasn’t that small breakfast…”

“Hush, dear. For a girl of your age that could be barely considered as a snack. Now, eat up. I’ll come in a bit to bring you something to drink.”

As Lynn left the room, Aly was once again facing a tray filled with junk food but, although she still was unsure about that, she waited less than before to dig in. As the Tv blared on on the Food Network, she quickly grabbed the first of three hot dogs, chewing on it with gusto as she then surveyed what else was there for her.

As she swiftly cleared out the first hot dog, and as she took the second one, she smiled seeing that apart from those there was also a medium sized bucket of KFC and around twenty nuggets, waiting for her. Right as she had cleared the second hot dog and started on the third, her Mom returned bringing her her drinks, this time a large Milkshake and a large Pepsi with ice.

Along with those, Aly also noticed that Lynn had also left on her tray a small plate with a few gooey chocolate brownies.

“There you go, baby. Soon, you’ll be back on your two feet. You’ll see.”

“Thankhsch….*Gulp*… Mom…”

For the rest of the day, easing up only at Aly’s later afternoon snack, both Lynn and Rick kept bringing tray upon tray to their daughter, in the forms of Lunch or as a snack to keep her energies up. Each time, Aly was less and less worried about the new diet her parents had put her on, as she began to enjoy the food they were giving to her. It was only two hours after having her dinner that, having eaten for the most part of the day, as she was laying in her bed, unconsciously caressing her bloated belly, Aly was surprised in seeing her father sneaking into her room as if he was avoiding her mom.

“Dad? What’s going on?”

Rick, having fully agreed with Lynn, prepared himself to deceive his young daughter.
‘It’s for her own good…’

“Hey baby, just wanted to bring you something to snack on instead of all those proteins Lynn is giving you. Here…enjoy, my dear”

As he said that, he left in front of her quite a large plate, upon which was resting an equally large slice of devil’s food cake, with three scoops of cookie dough ice cream on the side.

“I know you like Cookie Dough, so I Made sure to sneak a bit out of the kitchen, before Lynn could see me.”

Aly, although feeling definitely sated, couldn’t stop herself from letting herself go. Her father had done it for her, and so she couldn’t pass it all up, especially since he had also brought her a half pint of her favorite ice cream.

As she kissed her dad the good night, she remained alone in the room, slowly clearing out that last plate and, right after it, the remaining ice cream. It was early in the morning, when she finally managed to get asleep, she felt so full and tired that she was completely oblivious to the loud churning of her stomach.

As days passed in such a way, it was obvious that even her high metabolism couldn’t keep up. As the sheer quantity of meals, and their size, increased in the following week, Aly’s body began, finally, to show some changes.

Both Lynn and Rick, in those few occasions where Alexandra had to go to the bathroom and required their assistance, saw that they were on the right track. As she got up from bed, both could see that she was finally starting to have a bit of a jiggle on her middle and that her hips seemed the tiniest bit softer than before.

Still, the two parents knew that they couldn’t stop there.

Their little daughter had to grow a bit more before they could say that she was unable to exercise again.

Aly, instead, was growing rather fond of the diet that her parents had brought upon her. Every day she got to eat that delicious food that she couldn’t have afforded to have before. And thanks to it she was going to get better even sooner than expected.

How could she hate such a thing?

Yet, as the days passed, and her meals kept increasing, also Aly began to grow softer than before. But she could hardly care about that, passing most of her time in bed, under the covers, with food tempting her at her every side. She was far more interested in enjoying this vacation of a sort, instead of worrying about something that was so far away in the future.

Yet, Christmas was getting closer and closer and, although Rick and Lynn would have loved nothing more than get back together with all their children, they decided to send the other kids to their grandparents, as they had to keep following Aly’s wellbeing as she recovered from her ‘traumatic experience’.
141312.title: A Fast Food Diet

choices: Start giving her also the appetite stimulants, other than the bulk up powder?
try and condition her into thinking she need to actively bulk up?
Aly’s loving the pampering, but she starts to ask for more on her own
Aly’s noticing her belly sticking out a bit more than usual. Is she bloated?
1413122.content:
Aly, as usual, was laying in bed. In truth, as per her doctor order’s she was more than cleared to leave her bed and do some light exercises but, between the pampering and the food given to her by her parents, the girl had no real intention of wasting time on working out.

Still, the continuous meals and the lack of physical activity was affecting her, as a soft layer of pudge had started to cover her entire self. If she had looked at her reflection in the mirror she would have seen that her toned stomach was no more, having grown rather soft and with a bit of a jiggle in it already, while the hint of a double chin had begun to make itself notice under her chin.

But Aly, lost in the pleasure of eating and doing nothing all day long, didn’t even feel the need to leave her comfort, not even for a minute.

Lynn and Rick were both enthusiastic about the results although, they shared a different vision of how things had to proceed from that point forward. Lynn had just brought lunch to their daughter and, after making sure that she had started eating her meal, she had left her daughter alone, returning in the kitchen were Rick was waiting for her.

“Listen Lynn, we’ve got to talk.”

“What about?”

As Lynn replied to her husband, she didn’t stop working, checking the oven to be sure that the next set of pastries and dessert to be sent to Aly as a post lunch snack were almost ready.

“It’s about Aly. Look, I agreed with you to let her put on a few pounds, just enough to stop her gymnastic career. And we’ve done that. We should now focus on keeping her at this level.
You, instead, are seemingly invested in having her gain even more…”

Lynn, turned around, facing her husband, staring him deeply into his eyes.

“I…You’re right. From tomorrow we will start containing.”

Rick, happy about being the one who had won the conversation, for once, hugged his wife lovingly.

“I know you want only what’s best for her. I love you…”

“Love you too…”

As they separated and Rick went back to his studio to see if there were any last requests from his office, Lynn stood there silently watching her husband walking away.

‘Yes, Rick. I love her with all my heart.
That is why I’ll have her put on a few more pounds before considering stopping.’

In truth, Lynn had grown rather attracted by the idea of overfeeding her daughter.

Aly had always been a good girl who listened to her motherly advices, and yet as soon as she found out about that blasted gymnastic career she had started to make her own decisions on life. That, in Lynn’s eyes, was the worst thing that a daughter could do, especially one at such a young age.

What, in her mind, had started as a way to keep her from hurting herself, was becoming a way to control her daughter behavior and to make sure that she would have listened to her mother.

Plus, it was rather fun seeing how blindly Alexandra kept following whatever she said to her.

A sudden ringing sound within the kitchen made Lynn return into herself as she quickly opened her oven and took out the pan of thick chocolate chip cookies, pouring them into a bowl to cool off. As Lynn looked at the clock, she realized that not even half an hour had passed and, deciding to give another half hour of time to her girl to finish up lunch, before bringing her the next snack, she turned and took a small plastic bottle from a cabinet, taking it out from the place where it was hidden.

As she turned the plastic bottle within her hands, she quickly scanned once more what was written on the cover.

‘Bulk Up Powder. Use only if coupled with intense exercise. Do not exceed two tablespoon per day. If overdosed, may cause drowsiness, slowed metabolism, increase in hunger, weight gain.
Yes, Aly… trust in your mom. Keep chowing down what I bring you…’

As she quickly scooped up four large spoonful’s, she dumped them all into one of the milkshakes she had prepared for her daughter post lunch snack. As she mixed the shake, making sure that the powder was absorbed by it, she made to place the powder back where she had taken it, but as she was doing that she eyed the second milkshake that was still waiting on the table.

Grinning, Lynn took another four spoonful’s and repeated the process spiking also the second one, before placing the container back where she had hidden it from her husband eyes. Then, returning to the oven, she quickly took out a pie that had been cooking in there, as she left it on the counter to cool off. Already she was going to take the tray, with both the bowl of cookies and the two milkshakes to her daughter, when she saw Rick returning with a scowled expression.
Leaving the tray where it was, as she moved closer to him.

“Rick? Anything wrong?”

“You could say that. My boss in an ass.”

“What? What do you mean, dear?”

As she waited, she saw Rick go to the counter and, in anger, slam down one of his fist against it, the loud thud resounding within the kitchen. Rick, feeling calmer now that he had released some of his anger, turned toward Lynn with a sad frown on his face.

“My Boss has landed a big contract with an important client.

All request for time off have been cancelled. I’ve got to go back to the office.

Effect immediately.

And I don’t know if we’ll be able to close it by Christmas. I’m so sorry, dear.”

Before he could say anything more, she hugged him closely, as she calmed him, assuring him that she didn’t faulted him even for a minute, and that, although it wasn’t going to be the same without him, he was only doing what he could to provide for them.

“So don’t worry, dear, I couldn’t think any less of you. If anything, I’m even prouder of all the sacrifices you go through to sustain us. So you won’t join us for Christmas, but at dinner…?”

“Afraid not. The whole team has to go on site to perform the requested modifications. He told me that we will leave tomorrow. So, I’ll have to pack this evening as I return from the office.”


After sharing another kiss, as Lynn watched her husband leave the house, a frown initially appeared on her face but, as she realized that she was going to be alone with Aly up to Christmas, a grin rose on her face.

“Oh, Aly…almost the entire month together…I’ll make sure you are well fed.”

Still, as she composed herself, she grabbed the tray and went to her daughter room, as soon as she entered she saw that Aly had completely wiped any trace of her meal for some time already, as she was currently laying down watching tv. As soon as she saw her mom, though, she began to slowly move herself to a seating position, having grown used to receive these snack before and after her main meal times.

“Hey Mom…”

“Hey sweetie. How was your lunch?”

“Oh, it was delish. Thanks for letting me on this diet. It’s awesome.”

“Good. Here, this is your after lunch snack. Enjoy it, dear.”

Alexandra, although she had just eaten a double combo bacon burger meal, she still began to munch away at the cookies with abandon. She wasn’t exactly sure why but, as of late, she was feeling as if it took longer to satisfy her hunger. Still, surrounded by so much good food, she ignored the issue for the moment, as she began to focus only on what she had just received. As Lynn backed away, though, Alexandra stopped her suddenly, just as she drank down the first milkshake.

“Woah, Mom! These are so good! Could you make me a couple more? Please?”

“Oh, alright…But only since you’re asking so nicely. I’ll be right back.”

As her mom left, Alexandra began drinking from the second milkshake, stopping only when she was at almost half of it, as she turned back on the cookies. Although unaware of it, her stomach still bulged out in front of her as it filled up with food. Still, apart from scratching it unconsciously from time to time, the girl still kept her focus on her food and on the television show she was watching.

As she was watching she tried to change channel but, somehow the other channels didn’t seem to be working still. Tuning her tv back to the previous channel she resumed watching Food Network, although seeing all those tasty recipes on screen almost made her wish she could taste them.

Re-doubling her efforts on the cookies, she quickly polished them off, and, just as she started drinking up the remaining shake, her door opened revealing her mother coming back as promised. Only, she wasn’t bringing only the milkshakes Aly had asked for.

“Here you go, sweetie, three more shakes, I’ve made one more to finish up the container since it was just a handful left in it. Oh, also, I brought you the snacks for this later afternoon.

I’ll leave them here, on your bedpost.”

With that, Lynn left the tray she had been carrying which contained an entire blueberry pie and quite a stack of brownies, piled one atop the other. Alexandra, as she handed the empty shake cup to her mom, began to lay down against her pillow once more, slowly drinking her shakes, as she started to feel, finally, sated.

Although she couldn’t stop herself from eyeing the treats that her mom had brought her, from time to time.

“Ok, sweetie. Enjoy your rest. If you need anything, call me on the phone. See you later.”
“Thanks…*URP!*… Mom.”

As Lynn returned to the kitchen, to have a quick, light, lunch herself, she already was deciding what other snack she could bring to her daughter as a mid-afternoon snack. As she ate her light meal, she had another thought.

Since Rick was going to be leaving the very next day, maybe she could…
1413122.title: Week by week, the pounds start to rise…

choices: Less than a week to Christmas, Lynn treat each day as if it was Christmas...
Aly’s friend, Alicia, comes visiting, will she be tempted in join as a feedee?
It’s Christmas! Will Aly manage to digest what her mother has planned for her?
Alexandra can’t lie to herself anymore. She has for sure put on a few pounds…
14131223.content:
With the weeks passing in such a similar manner, Alexandra began to lose herself in the rhythm of the meals that her mother brought to her every so often. And yet, as much as she was eating already, which was way more than any other teenager had to receive, still, she soon realized that she couldn’t manage to feel herself satisfied as it had happened before.

That same day, for example, not even an hour had passed since she had received the mid afternoon snack, which had been composed by two beef burritos and two cheese burgers, and yet, she was already feeling her hungry middle growling noisily. Still seated in her bed, as she tried to fend off her rising hunger by focusing on her shows on TV, she could only look around as she tried vainly to find something she could snack on as she waited for her next snack.

Realizing that nothing was available, she took out her phone from her bedpost and quickly called her mom.

“Mom?”

“Yes, Sweetie? What is it?”

“Could you bring me something to snack on? I’m really hungry for some reason.”

“Well, that must mean that you’re recovering dear. I’ll bring you right away something. Give me a minute, please.”

A few minutes later, just as promised, Aly saw her mom entering her room while carrying quite the large tray filled to the brim with pastries and cookies, along with a couple of the milkshake Aly had started to grow addicted on.

Lynn had barely time to leave the tray on her daughter lap that the girl already began to ferociously assault it. Smiling, as she saw that her daughter was finally getting somewhere with her weight, as what had once been a small layer of pudge was swiftly turning in quite the potbelly, Lynn sat near her daughter and, with the excuse of giving her a hug, proceeded in seeing how well her daughter was getting.

As she pinched her softly, she could see that Aly was finally starting to chub up quite a bit and, by the way her PJ’s looked, she was growing out of them quite fast.

‘At this rate, I’ll have to replace her Pj within after tomorrow, or the following day… Good.’

Letting go of her growing girl, she quickly stood and started to leave the room, stopping only at the door, informing her daughter that her late afternoon snack was almost ready.

“Thanksch...*Munch*… Mom…*Gulp.*… Oh, and Mom? Could you please bring me also a pie and some of that ice cream cake you brought me the other day? It was so good and I’m feeling like a craving for something sugary…”

“Sure baby. All you want for my little injured angel. Rest and recover now, I’ll bring you the food in a bit.”

Alexandra, as soon as her mother left the room returned ferociously at her ‘snack’, chewing and swallowing as if she had been starved. But, as she cleaned the tray, and drank both the milkshakes, she burped quite unladylike and fell back against her bed.

Looking down she did notice that her belly seemed quite a bit bloated but, still in denial about her weight gain, she simply ignored it and rolled on her side to nap a bit more, as she waited for the next meal to be brought to her. If anyone could have seen her in that moment, nobody would have recognized her for the talented gymnast she had been.

Aly had really started to chub up.

Her double chin was much more definite than before, while both her arms and legs had grown thicker, especially her thighs, which were reducing time and time again the gap between one and the other. But her most noticeable assets were, without a doubt her hips and belly. While her breast had grown a bit, her belly and butt had started to grow massively.

Already, her belly was starting to overlap her pajama pants, as a definite set of love handles were making themselves know at her sides. While her hips and butt were getting wider and wider, already pushing her up a bit more than before whenever she sat up in bed. But, gluttonous Aly was enjoying too much to be treated in such a way, to pass her days lazily watching tv and eating. She had even stopped going on the internet and she barely was replying anymore to her coach WhatsApp messages.

Lynn instead, was enjoying herself too much.

Although she didn’t want to admit it, the way she acted was way over the simple need to make sure that her daughter would be out of her gymnastic career, she was growing addicted to the feeling of being the one in control when it came to her daughter behavior.

As she rechecked everything in the kitchen, making sure that the next snack was going to be ready in time, she quickly fished out her phone and called the delivery service from Jack in the Box, placing up quite a large order, so that she could have it ready by the time her ‘not so little Aly’ had finished with her next snack.

As she stood there, checking and re-checking everything she saw the three milkshakes she had prepared but, as she looked them over she wasn’t sure if she had already spiked them or not. In order to make sure, she added a couple more spoonful’s of bulk up powder to each, resolving that between four and six spoonful’s, worst case, there wasn’t much difference.

As she had done that, feeling ready and satisfied she took the tray and began bringing it to her daughter room.

Week after week passed in a deluge of treats and snacks and meals for the once toned gymnastic athlete, which now was starting to resemble more and more a beached whale, as she kept laying on her bed, swallowing down whatever treat her mom brought to her. Aly was literally losing herself with all the eating she did, starting to associate the time of the day by one of the countless meals that her mother brought to her to be consumed.

Especially since, as it had happened each day of the previous week, her mom would bring her two to three time the usual amount of food, asking her if she could help her in getting rid of the left overs. Naturally, having gorged strenuously before, gluttonous Aly couldn’t find in herself the heart to refuse to her mother pleadings.

These strenuous activities, naturally, did nothing but enlarge her already cavernous stomach and fuel up her continually growing hunger. Lynn couldn’t be prouder as she saw her daughter, messily lying in her bed, covered in crumbles and stains, her massively engorged stomach rising so high that she could barely see the television screen in front of her.

And yet, although she looked just as full as she could be, as soon as she moved closer, letting her see the tray that she was holding within her arms, filled with Christmas themed sugary treats, her daughter began to plead for having them.

Alexandra couldn’t believe herself. She had finished eating her second lunch a few minutes ago and yet, as soon as she saw the next tray brought forth from her mom, she felt her belly growling out for more.

In truth she couldn’t have been happier in just lazily enjoying the Christmas festivities and yet, as she looked in front of her, seeing only her wobbling dome of a belly, she idly wondered if she maybe was letting things go a bit too much.

Yet, as the sugary goodies were within her arms reach, she didn’t hesitate a moment in grabbing handfuls of them, messily pushing them within her mouth.

Burping in satisfaction, she fell back against her pillows as she began to finally feel full and drowsy, choosing to have a quick nap, in order to be ready for when her mother would bring her, in less than an hour, her next meal.
14131223.title: Hunger rising…

choices: A week of Christmas meals (part II)
Aly feels a strange constant hunger. She, literally, can’t stop eating!
Lynn notices that Aly’s gains are slowing. She needs her to gain faster!
Aly, the day before Christmas, tries to leave the bed, but she's having issues!?
141312231.content:
Lynn was busily working at the stove, behind her the table in the kitchen was already almost completely covered by platefuls of food, and yet the woman kept preparing and cooking, while also checking on her phone for the home deliveries she had ordered beforehand.

In those days, as it was less than a week until Christmas, she had decided to treat every single day as it was already Christmas, when it came to Aly’s meals. She had heard Rick a few days before, and he had told her that hopefully by the new year he might be able to return home.

This, in her state, meant that she only had less than two weeks to make sure that her daughter put on as much weight as possible. For, when Rick was returning, troubles would surely ensue.

‘Still…’, she reasoned, ‘I’ve come this far… I can’t stop now. Plus, can’t have my poor darling starve right during Christmas…’

Leaving the stove for a moment, she quickly went to the door, where a new delivery boy had just arrived and made himself present. Taking the food and leaving the guy a tip, she quickly returned to the kitchen where she loaded up the trolley, she had started to use to bring her growing daughter her meals.

Moving swiftly she quickly reached her daughter bedroom just as her phone began ringing.

“Sweetie…Mommy’s here with third lunch! Hope you’re ready…”

As soon as Lynn entered the room, a jubilant smile appeared on her face. Alexandra had truly blossomed under the massive avalanche of meals that she had gotten her used upon. The girl was still laying in her bed although, now, it wasn’t much of a choice but more a matter of being too hard on her to lift herself up from there.

For Alexandra had grown massive.

With an average of nine main meals per day, with the empty time filled with snacking, Aly barely had a minute in her daily routines during which she wasn’t eating. This had made her body grow a thick stratum of adipose all over itself. Her face hadn’t actually changed all that much, it had grown a bit rounder and softer on the edges but, it mostly was the same.

The rest of her, instead, had seemingly exploded with fat.

Her neck was now partially covered by a definite double chin, with a third flabby roll which had recently started to make its appearance. Her shoulders and torso had grown softer and thicker as well. Her arms, had started to develop some nicely sized bingo wings, while even her wrists and hands were now puffier than before, often giving her a hard time when she tried to use the TV remote to change channel on her TV.

Her breast had grown too, although, as usual, not by much. Although she was going braless most of the time now, they still maintained some perkiness and so weren’t being pulled down by gravity but, it was visible the strain on them. Her belly and lower body was the most impacted by the diet she had been following now for those months. Her belly having grown gargantuan, forcing her to lay down in a semi seated position in order to see the screen over it.

It was a massive dome like doughy mass which, was kept almost continually full of food. Her hips and ass cheeks had grown even bigger than before. Her mother could clearly see that, if Alexandra was ever to try and leave that room, she would surely get stuck in the door frame. If she was able to go through it, at all.

In that moment, Lynn made a quick note to herself, adding the widening of her daughter’s door frames to the list of things to get done before Rick’s return. She would surely have to pay extra but, it was going to be worth it.

Her thighs, her legs, even her feet, were so swollen with fat, so enveloped within it, that if she was to try and move, she couldn’t do much but waddle… or even shuffle her feet on the ground. Only the thought sent a shiver of excitement through Lynn spine, although she made sure to not show it to her daughter.

As Lynn got closer to Aly’s bed, she seemed to suddenly wake up from her apparent sleep. As much as Lynn had managed to understand, since Aly had grown so used to eat constantly, every time she found herself without something to place within her mouth, she closed her eyes and slept, almost as if she tried to recover from having her humongous belly permanently full.

As this was the case, in a matter of minutes, Aly was already laying back against the header of the bed, barely waiting for her mother to release the tray before she began dig in into her new meal. Lynn sat nearby admiring her daughter gorging, and ready to replace each emptied plate with a new one, but it wasn’t only for that. She had noticed that lately she was getting slower and slower in her feasting, to her it was apparent that Alexandra was starting to have issues in moving her arms, yet not one to point it out, she simply sat there, admiring the view and waiting for her daughter to require assistance.

Aly was barely aware of what day or time it was anymore, everything for her now was focused only on what she was had eaten, what she was going to eat and what she was currently eating. She even had forget the reason for which she was eating this much, although she had still some faded memories about some kind of activity she had to perform within the following year.

But whenever she thought about it she, either was eating, and so was focused only on that, or she had just finished eating, so she justified herself by promising she would remind herself in a day or two.

Now, though, with her mom at her side, she could only focus on what she had on her plates.

It was third lunch, that meant that after two massive meals of homemade, Christmas themed, delicacies, she now could splurge on the junk food she had grown addicted to. Rapidly she snatched from the tray the first triple patty, with cheddar and bacon, burger she could from the pile of five she had on her tray, swiftly lifting it to her hungry mouth as she gave it a massive bite.

Grease juices and sauces began to dribble a bit from her lips, staining her chins but, with the taste on her tongue, she could care less about that as she munched quickly and swallowed, already going for a second massive bite. Bit by bit, as her hunger powered stomach angrily demanded sustenance, she made quick work of the five burgers, as she then drank down the first milkshake that her mom quickly offered her as she then replaced the empty tray with the following one.

Alexandra, moaned lightly as she downed her shake, it was just as good as it had always been, and yet, although she felt it land pretty heavily in her rounding out belly, she still turned her attention again on the new tray that her mom had just given her.

This time, there were two large buckets of KFC, everything drenched in BBQ sauce. Licking her lips she quickly started to clean each piece of tender chicken meat, all the while licking her lips and fingers, as much as she could, while oil and sauce mixed together on her neck as she messily ate everything.

Once also the second tray was finally empty she downed the next shake, and then belched loudly, as her piggish, frenzied, eyes turned toward the following tray. This time, it was desserts.

With a total of four trays worth of food into her stomach, plus the same number of shakes, Aly was a wreck, as she almost always was after her meals. Barely able to breath, sweating profusely, she could only lay down and try to stand still as she recovered her energies.

Today, though, she realized that things were going to be a bit different.

“Sweetie? It’s no time to rest yet. There is still after dessert to have.”

“Wha…*BURP*… What? What are… you talking…about?”

“Dearie, it’s the holidays, you have to eat a bit more…wouldn’t want to waste it, would you? Here, let me help you…open up…”

As Aly was exhausted, Lynn began to grab one last tray she had kept hidden on the lower level of the tray, revealing that she had a full assortment of pastries and treats ready to be stuffed within her daughter belly.

Without giving Aly time to reply, Lynn began to cram those treat forcefully in her child mouth, forcing her to chew and swallow them, and then repeating the process, apparently deaf to the girl protests.

Still, since everything Lynn was giving to her growing daughter was still laced with both the appetite stimulants and, in smaller doses, of the bulking up powder, the poor girl felt herself full to burst and yet hungry for more.

Unable anymore to resist the urge to gorge as much as possible, she began to oppose less and less resistance at her mother feedings, until she gave in completely moaning in pleasure until each treat was finally pushed and crammed within her over-engorged belly.

With the last tray emptied of its contents, Lynn felt satisfied.

Her daughter was already addicted to eat a smorgasbord of food but, if she could manage to have her grow addicted to the sensation of being over-engorged, making her strive to keep herself always at that point, she was sure that Aly would finally be in the right direction to grow just as much as Lynn needed her to.

The woman, although she often reminded herself of doing this only to prevent Aly from returning to her gymnastic career, knew deep inside of her that, that objective had been already reached. Yet, between the pleasure of ordering around her daughter, and the desire to see how much bigger she could make her, Lynn knew that she wasn0t going to stop anytime soon.

Not, if she managed to have it her way.

“Good Job, sweetie. Now, rest a bit that, in twenty minutes I’ll bring you your first post lunch snack.”

“Sure…*URP*… Mom. Can’t…wait…*BELCH!*… for it.
Mmh… so full…so good…”

(continue in part II)
141312231.title: Bountiful Weekly Feast! ( part I)

choices: Christmas, Aly needs to clear the bed for a bit. Lynn keeps her in the kitchen
During second lunch, on Christmas, her coach calls her. Lynn answer the phone.
Keep following the day to day routine of a growing human land whale
During a snack meal, Aly burst out, again, of her PJ. Lynn isn’t there to cover
1413122311.content:
Lynn excitedly rose from her seat as she started to move away the trolley, now emptied of all its goodies. As she left the room, she stopped at the door frame to steal one last glance at her beautiful daughter.

Seeing her laying down on her bed, so full to be almost on the verge of bursting, left her feeling giddy like nothing else did, nowadays. Yet, she suddenly noticed that the PJ Aly was wearing seemed to be rather tight on her daughter frame. As she wondered when she had helped her daughter change in her last, she decided that probably they could last another day of stuffing.

So, adding to her mental list of things to do, she told herself to swap it on the following day. As she quickly returned to the kitchen, she rapidly placed herself back to work at the stoves, as she had to prepare for the multi course dinner that she was going to bring to her girl as dinners that evening.

During the afternoon, instead, she was going to provide to Alexandra with food ordered from outside, as it had started to be the usual in their household.

Barely fifteen minutes later, Lynn was once more moving another restocked trolley to Aly’s room, this time bringing her enough Chinese food to last for a couple of people. Naturally, as if she could ever forget, she added to the spread, her own spiked milkshakes.

As she tried each night to count how many calories she had managed to stuff her daughter with, she had noticed that thanks to the bulk up powder, the largest quantity of calories came exactly from the three to five shakes, per meal, she managed to stuff down Aly’s throat, each and every day.

As she entered the room, she saw that her daughter was once again in her light sleeping mode, from which she awoke just as Lynn moved the trolley to lay beside Aly’s bed. As the gorging whale on the bed woke up, she immediately began to lick her lips in anticipation.

It didn’t matter to her that not even half an hour before she had consumed enough food for five people, as she had got used to have this continuous meals provided, she couldn’t refrain from indulge each and every time. Quickly, Lynn passed her the first, large, container which was filled with Chinese noodles, giving her daughter then the fork with which she swiftly began to stuff her greedy mouth.

As the day proceeded in such a way, with Lynn bringing massive meals, passing them as snacks, for her growing girl to eat, almost every hour or so, when it came time for dinner, Aly was barely holding up together. That day in particular had been extremely filling for the gorging girl, with her stomach placed under continuous stress as her mother had brought her more food for her to consume.

Still, although she felt her dome like belly still loaded with the remnants of her gorging, she nonetheless, prepared herself to receive the three dinners that she was expecting her mother to bring her.

Massaging, with circular motions, the sides of the bloated beachball she called stomach, Aly didn’t see anything wrong in waiting her next sets of meals, since she was more than used to it. Although, she had to admit to herself, she felt a bit constricted within her PJ’s.

Dismissing the thought, as she heard the trolley moving toward her door in the corridor outside, she never seemed to notice how tight her Pj was actually on her. The pants, having given up since long time already, the battle to contain her mid-section, were now only trying to contain her humongous hips and thighs, and still a few gaps could already be seen, if she wasn’t under her blanket.

The top was an entirely different story. The button up shirt was tightly stretched against her wide expanse, especially on her middle, where the buttons seemed to be holding only by their last breaths, with her flabby skin showing within the gaps between one button and the other.

Still, as he mom entered, and placed the trolley beside the growingly huge girl, Aly had eyes only for the rich food coming her way, already drooling a bit as Lynn placed the first salad bowl of Mac’n’Cheese, passing then to her a large spoon, almost a ladle, so that she could start to shovel the cheesy pasta into herself. Alexandra didn’t wait long to start digging in, as she fed herself large spoonful’s from the bowl under her eyes, barely chewing, in her haste to fill herself up once more.

As the spoon clinked within the emptied bowl, Lynn quickly replaced it with a similar sized pan, bringing forward four large squares of lasagna. To which the girl squealed a bit in pleasure as she began shoveling them within her lips, even as her overfed middle began to rumble loudly in protest.

But, it was in the middle of the second courses, after Alexandra, had stuffed herself with the three first courses dishes, and had already cleaned out one massive steak with fries, that she had to suddenly stop in surprise.

She was currently munching through a half roasted chicken, as the other half was still awaiting her on its plate, when suddenly her pajama declared his surrender in the battle of the bulges that it had fought all day long. In a moment, each and every button popped off, strained way over the limit as Aly’s engorged middle had kept pushing against it, with more and more force.

But as the buttons popped off, ricocheting on the wardrobe on the opposite side of the room, Aly suddenly stopped eating, as she looked down as if seeing her massively engorged belly for the first time.

Lynn could see that she had been foolish in thinking that the poor garments was going to resist the onslaught of food she had brought on her daughter, yet, not all was lost. For although, Aly was currently in shock over seeing her naked belly for the first time since her parents had forced her to stay in bed, Lynn acted quickly, moving the platter with the still uneaten chicken right under her daughter eyes, holding it there so to cover the massive expanse of flabby, fatty, flesh that her daughter was now sporting.

Alexandra blinked a few times, as if she couldn’t believe at what she had seen. For that briefest moment she had actually thought that she had to be mistaken.

‘I can’t have gained so much, can I? Aren’t I following Mom’s diet?’

But as Lynn quickly acted, when she opened her eyes she saw that all she could see was only the large platter where the other half chicken was still awaiting her. As if she had forgotten of what she had seen moments before, she smiled a bit, dismissing any thoughts about having put on weight and returned to her eating, feeling strangely much better than before, without that oppressive feeling of constriction all over her.

Lynn breathed a sigh of relief, she had managed to defuse the situation temporarily but, she also needed to find a better solution, for the current evening at least. As she kept the plate there, hovering over Aly’s engorged belly, with her other hand she began to try and cover the mound of fat and yet to be digested food, with the blanket covers of the bed.

As she finished, not entirely satisfied but, content nonetheless, she wished herself luck and moved the platter away. Once more, Aly's eyes began to focus on the immense mound outlined by the bed covers but, unable to see it as her own belly, she quickly released a content burp and placed the cleaned out bones of chicken on the platter, as she prepared to continue on the second half.

Before she could grab it, though, she turned and saw that her mom was already offering her one of her favorite milkshakes. Swiftly chugging down the milkshake, the girl then returned to her meal, although she started to slow down in her consumption, until she was barely able to pick the last pieces of meat from the roasted chicken.

As her massive stomach, although used to be over-engorged, was starting to be pretty much filled up, Aly began to slowly lay more on her back, as she burped and belched trying to release some space. But, as much as she felt like she could eat some more, she realized that she was starting to feel weaker faster than usual. And as her mother placed in front of her, carefully balancing the platter on her engorged belly, she turned toward her asking something she hadn’t ever asked before.

“M-Mom?”

“Yes, Sweetie?”

“Could you…*BURP!*… help me…finish…*BELCH!*…my first dinner? I… I feel…so tired…”

“But of course, Sweetie. You’ve just got to ask if you need any help. You’re a growing girl…it is natural that you would feel tired.

Here, open up then, let Mama give you some much needed food…”

Lynn, grinning like a maniac, since the second courses had also been cleared out, quickly brought forth the last part of her daughter first dinner. Sweets and cakes. Keeping a large tray on her own knees, with one of the treats she had prepared for her, a large sheet cake, Lynn began to take large spoonful’s of it and, slowly at first, began to spoon feed her daughter with it, pushing more and more of it within the girl opened up lips.

Aly, was enjoying the treatment as cake was swiftly given to her, spoonful after spoonful, as she felt the delicious taste of it on her tongue, as it traveled down in her throat and as it finally landed heavily in her already overpacked belly. But no matter how full she was, she knew that the one rule that there was in the household was about no leftovers, so she pressed on, munching and swallowing everything her mother pushed into her, gulping it all down as she used her two fattened arms, to try and massage her belly as much as she could.

A bit later, as Aly slowly swallowed the last of the treats that Lynn had fed to her, the almost bursting girl let out a loud burp, as she tried to caress her humongous, engorged , middle.
Barely hearing to her mother, as she warned her that second dinner was going to come in less than one hour.
1413122311.title: Bountiful Weekly Feast! ( part II)

14131223111.content:
Alexandra was upset.

It wasn’t about food, she had had plenty of that as soon as she woke up, and even as she slept although she wasn’t yet aware of that, but it was because for the first time in months, her mother had told her that she had to get off of her bed.

It had passed so much time since she had to vacate it for longer than a bathroom stops, that she almost wasn’t aware of the world outside of her room. Yet, on Christmas morning, her mother had come to help her relocate, temporarily, somewhere else. The deluded, spoiled, girl was furious. Yet, she couldn’t else but comply, although she tried her best to passively resist her mother attempts.

Lynn, as much as she had enjoyed turning her perfectly fit daughter, in the obscenely obese land whale she now was, now was almost regretting it. It was true that, since her objective was to keep her as lazy as possible, she had kept on spoiling her but, that morning she had the need of moving Aly out of the room.

It was something that couldn’t be postponed anymore.

It took the two of them almost an hour and half to have Aly off her bed and standing, although Lynn was happy to see that even those simple motion was leaving her daughter completely out of breath and energy.

She took a moment to admire her girl, in one of her rarest occasions to be standing up.

She could see her humongous body, massively enlarged after months of laziness and extreme overfeeding, her belly drooping down, almost reaching her knees, hiding from view, although not completely, her thighs and her lower privates. Riddled with stretchmarks and looking painfully bloated, her massive gut was really a spectacle to see, especially since her button up PJ, although tight against it, still failed to contain it.

But, what Lynn realized was an even more spectacular show to watch, was seeing Aly move. As she waddled and shuffled her feet on the ground, slowly moving forward as her entire form wobbled and jiggled crazily.

And her panting.

The woman couldn’t believe what a wonderful sound was her daughter panting as she huffed and puffed breathlessly, with every slow, ponderous step toward the kitchen.

She almost was tempted to let her walk some more, just to keep enjoying the scene but, she knew that thanks to that transfer, they were already massively behind the daily schedule. So, as soon as Aly was seating on the heavy duty bench, precisely bought for the occasion, Lynn began to place platters upon platters of food right under her eyes, confident that, no matter how tired she could have been, her pig of a daughter wouldn’t be able to stop herself.

Alexandra was a wreck, a literal wreck.

Sweating, tired and, most importantly, extremely hungry. As angry as she was with her mom, though, as soon as large platters appeared in front of her she couldn’t refrain from launching herself at them, digging in messily, stuffing and gorging herself like a starved beast. As she was busy gorging, she never noticed her mom leaving the kitchen for a few minutes, returning then with a satisfied smile on her face.

Aly couldn’t care less.

All she needed was the feeling of her bloated stomach, stuffed to bursting point, and over that even. Still, as she was almost halfway through the platters left on the table, her anger began to flare up once more but, as she turned a questioning, tantrum filled, glare at her mom she began to relax hearing her response.

“Now, now, Sweetie. Do not worry, this was only the first course. Today is Christmas and, although it may not have started in the best of way, I’ll make sure to fill your cute little tummy with all the food you may ever wanted.

Trust your mama on this one.”

Alexandra seemed to rejoice in hearing those words.

Especially since her ‘tummy’ was extremely demanding of her as of late.

What she wasn’t aware of was that the constant abuse of the appetite stimulants was starting to slowly give her a case of warped appetite. Her body was starting to feel constantly hungry, unable to feel full at all times. She didn’t worry about her growing hunger, as she repeated herself that she was a growing girl, and so it had to be pretty normal to be feeling this way.

After a bit, as she had managed to clean out every platter on the table and, as she burped and belched, moderately content of the appetizers, she stared with a joyous smile as she saw that her mom had began to fill the table again with more appetizers, leaving bowls and pans of fries, of bacon strips, greasy sausages, and so much more that she literally couldn’t see the entirety of it at once.

Delving once more into her feast, going at it with speed more than taste, her gut began to fill up and bloat out, forcing her to slowly whine pitifully, as she tried to move her massive ham like thighs wide open, until her mom moved beside her to help. Kneeling, she quickly grabbed those fat laden pillars of flesh and slowly dragged them to the side, leaving a wide-open space for her gut to fill.

Lynn, hearing Aly sigh pleasantly as she resumed her ferocious gorging, rose from the floor and marveled once more at how massive her daughter was becoming under her guidance.

The lithe athletic, hardworking, girl she had been just a few months before was now completely enveloped and buried under hundreds of pounds of fat flesh, having been replaced by the gluttonous, never sated, behemoth that was currently clearing out a second table worth of food from their kitchen. Lynn couldn’t be prouder of her work.

And yet, as she saw Aly start to slow down in her gorging, she knew that there was still room for improvement.

“Sweetie? Ready for first course of today’s lunch?”

Aly barely had the strength to answer. As much as she felt herself starving, she also felt her stomach cries of fullness. Yet, with the tantalizing aroma that surrounded her and her own chemical induced hunger pushing her, she slowly nodded making her three flabby chin rolls wobble with the movement.

“Ye…*BURP!*…es, Mom. M’ hungry.”

And so the meal continued, with Alexandra sinking deeper into the abyss of gluttony, as she gorged on platters after platters of greasy and caloric food, alternating home made recipes with fast food ordered through deliveries. And, as she ate herself even rounder than she already was, she kept downing larger and larger cups of her favorite shakes, unknowingly filling herself with thousands of calories in one fell swoop.

But, as much as her hunger had managed to push her on, as much as she had gotten used to overeating, her body still had its limits. As she managed to clear out a second set of first courses and even a massive party order of junk food, she then stopped entirely, feeling like the food she had just eaten, could come out at any moment against her will.

Her mother, seeing, and feeling her taut rock hard gut, smiled at her, giving her some time to rest and digest, before continuing with the onslaught of food.

“Good Job, sweetie. Now, have a quick nap, make up some room and then we will continue.”

“I…*urp*…hrf…huff…ok….ergh…mom…Don’t…Don’t…let me…*Belch!*… sleep… too much…
Am…still…hungry… f-for…”

Before she could finish her phrase, Alexandra was already asleep, her body pushing her into it to try and digest a portion of what she had forcefully pushed within her. As she slept, Lynn got closer and, began undressing her, wishing to avoid a repeat of what had happened before with her clothes.

Rapidly, she took off Aly’s PJ and replaced it with a similar one, although several times bigger, so that not only she had room to grow into it, but she wouldn’t feel as constricted as she was before. Standing back, having managed to at least replace the button up shirt, Lynn felt satisfied, especially since she had managed to find another pajama in the same model that Aly had been using up to now.

She knew that having a button up top wasn’t the best for a girl like Aly but, she couldn’t take off from her mind the glorious spectacle she had assisted to when her old top had burst open, showering buttons everywhere in the room. Although it had been a close call, Lynn couldn’t stop herself from hoping to see it again.

As her daughter slept deeply, snoring quite loudly, her mom left the room and went toward her daughter room, looking in marvel at what was going on in there. For she had a very specific reason for having forced her daughter to move into the kitchen, apart from being closer to the massive meal Lynn had planned for her.

The real reason for the temporary transfer was to…

Dustin fluttered his eyes open the sun stirring him to wake up. He shifted himself, feeling the smooth skin of his lover rub against his body as he did. He felt his hands wrapped around something soft. He instinctively gave it as squeeze, then realized that it was Tom's belly. "My Tom really has been putting on weight." He though to himself. It had been putting it off as bulking but now that was becoming less likely and maybe more that Tom was oblivious of his own weight gain. Then an idea snapped into Dustin's mind. "Am I gaining weight too?" Dustin slowly and quietly got out of bed as to make sure that he wouldn't disturb Tom. Dustin slipped away heading into his walk in closet where he had a mirror that he used to look at clothes he was going to wear. Dustin slipped his shirt off and saw the damages that he and Tom's new diet had been doing to him. A small pale belly poked out from his wait he placed his hands on his new belly giving it a shake as watched it jiggle as his hands. Then his eyes scanned down to his chest, seeing it was puffier than he remembered, "Am I getting moobs" Dustin whispered to himself. Though strangely he wasn't mortified about the idea, actually the more he looked at himself the more he liked it, and wanted more. To be honest he was starting to like how he and Tom could just eat what they want and whenever they wanted, no diet or anything, not to mention how much fun it was to wake up in the middle of the night and just eat.

Though of course Tom had a strict plan to follow to and can't afford to just eat so unhealthily. He could tell that Tom had not idea about his weight gain. If this kept up then it wouldn't be long till his coach started saying something, not to mention the media getting into a frenzy about his lover's new weight. So many hurdles to go through. Though... Jack had been gaining weight as well. Tom had been poking fun of him about it, ironic given Tom's situation. Perhaps if Jack had also got bigger than it would ay least shift attention away from Tom. He and Tom were having such a great time just letting go and Dustin did not wanted to have that changed just yet. Not to mention seeing how the both of them expand as the days went on, well I guess the three of them since he was going to need Jack to gain weight as a form of damage control for Tom. It was gonna be hard, given how Jack has been trying to lose weight, but as long as he was in his and Tom's proximity it should be fine.

Dustin yet again glanced at the mirror cupping his chest. "I wonder how much bigger it will get" He wondered.
